notes: Algorithm: convert to NNF (thm:existence-negation-normal-form over def:negation-normal-form), then distribute or over and (thm:distributive-laws) via replacement (thm:replacement-of-logical-equivalents) to reach CNF (def:conjunctive-normal-form). All five load-bearing. The conclusion's == is produced transitively by the equivalence-preserving rewrite theorems, so def:logical-equivalence is not added here -- though note the canonical-form theorems 0068/0069 cite it directly; reviewer may add for uniformity.
